name: wilson-readme-format
description: Deny Write/Edit on a repo-root README.md that violates the readme-format anti-patterns (multi-glyph H1, non-English At-a-glance fence, forbidden #### heading). Standalone port of wilson's guard-readme-format — no wilson binary dependency. Ships a companion `docs-convention` skill teaching the README/UPPERCASE.md roadmap conventions up front — also covers wilson-guards/domain-lint.
